title: Bangkok, Bangkok — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bangkok, Bangkok: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bangkok is a city in Bangkok with a population of 10,539,000. Thailand’s vibrant capital blends ancient temples with modern skyscrapers, offering world-class street food, a thriving expat community, and a cost of living that’s a fraction of Western cities.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
